Core.DirectLexLineNumberSyncInterval TYPE: int VERSION: 2.0.0 DEFAULT: 0 --DESCRIPTION-- <p> Specifies the number of tokens the DirectLex line number tracking implementations should process before attempting to resyncronize the current line count by manually counting all previous new-lines. When at 0, this functionality is disabled. Lower values will decrease performance, and this is only strictly necessary if the counting algorithm is buggy (in which case you should report it as a bug). This has no effect when %Core.MaintainLineNumbers is disabled or DirectLex is not being used. </p> --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
